_comment: The production 3-phase funnel that took ~325k conditioned-DPLM TPS designs to 48 wet-lab candidates (16/class for first-cyclization classes c0/c1/c10), 2026-06. Each tier runs run_eval_pipeline.py with the given fold/cofold + tool set, then run_funnel.py merges the tier's new metric CSVs WITH the previous tier's survivors CSV (carry-forward) and applies the tier's selection spec. Reproduces FILTERING_AND_SELECTION.md on NAS _production_gen_300k_2026-06-21. Compute escalates per tier (CPU sequence metrics on all -> ESMFold on thousands -> AF3 holo on hundreds).
name: production_300k
